name: Clear Wallpaper History
tokens: Clear Wallpaper History;Clears the personalization wallpaper history registry entries and cached background files.

name: Cleanup Component Store

tokens: Cleanup Component Store;Cleans up the Windows component store (WinSxS folder) to free up disk space. This is a safe operation that removes superseded components and reduces the size of the component store.

name: Clear Delivery Optimization Files
tokens: Clear Delivery Optimization Files;Deletes Delivery Optimization cache used for Windows Update P2P sharing. The DoSvc service will be stopped.

name: Clear DirectX Shader Cache
tokens: Clear DirectX Shader Cache;Clears DirectX and vendor shader caches (NVIDIA, AMD, Intel). Shaders will be recompiled on next app launch.

name: Disable Reserved Storage
missing_tokens: Disables Windows Reserved Storage, which reserves about 7GB of disk space for Windows updates and temporary files. Only recommended if you have limited disk space and understand the implications.
tokens: Disable Reserved Storage;Disables Windows Reserved Storage, which reserves about 7GB of disk space for Windows updates and temporary files. Only recommended if you have limited disk space and understand the implications.

name: Clear {logName} Event Log
tokens: Clear {logName} Event Log;Clears the Windows {logName} event log. WARNING: Logs cannot be recovered after clearing.

name: Clear Font Cache
tokens: Clear Font Cache;Clears the Windows font cache. Use this if fonts are not rendering properly. The FontCache service will be stopped and restarted.

name: Clear Temporary Internet Files
tokens: Clear Temporary Internet Files;Clears legacy WinINet cache (INetCache, INetCookies, WebCache, History). Used by Explorer, old Control Panel, and some installers.

name: Clear Memory Dump Files
tokens: Clear Memory Dump Files;Deletes BSoD memory dump files (MEMORY.DMP). These can be several GB in size.

name: Clear Prefetch Files
tokens: Clear Prefetch Files;Clears Windows prefetch files used for application launch optimization. Files will be regenerated over time.

name: Remove Product Key from Registry
tokens: Remove Product Key from Registry;Removes the Windows product key from the registry to prevent theft by malicious code. The key can be reactivated if needed.

name: Empty Recycle Bin
tokens: Empty Recycle Bin;Empties the Recycle Bin for all drives. Files cannot be recovered after deletion.

name: Clear Shadow Copies
missing_tokens: Removes all shadow copies (volume backups) to free up disk space. WARNING: This permanently removes System Restore points and volume snapshots.
tokens: Clear Shadow Copies;Removes all shadow copies (volume backups) to free up disk space. WARNING: This permanently removes System Restore points and volume snapshots.

name: Clear SRUM Database
tokens: Clear SRUM Database;Deletes the System Resource Usage Monitor (SRUM) database which tracks app, service, and network usage.

name: Clear Temporary Files
tokens: Clear Temporary Files;Deletes temporary files from user and system temp folders. Files in use will be skipped.

name: Clear Thumbnail Cache
tokens: Clear Thumbnail Cache;Clears Explorer thumbnail cache files. Thumbnails will be regenerated when needed.

name: Clear Windows Error Reporting Files
tokens: Clear Windows Error Reporting Files;Deletes Windows Error Reporting (WER) crash dumps and report metadata from system and user folders.

name: Delete Windows.old Folder
missing_tokens: Removes previous Windows installation files from Windows.old. WARNING: You will not be able to roll back to the previous Windows version after deletion.
tokens: Delete Windows.old Folder;Removes previous Windows installation files from Windows.old. WARNING: You will not be able to roll back to the previous Windows version after deletion.

name: Clear Windows Update Cache
tokens: Clear Windows Update Cache;Resets Windows Update cache (SoftwareDistribution and catroot2). Use this to fix update loops. Update catalog metadata will be redownloaded.

tokens: Disable Microsoft Edge Features;Disables telemetry, personalization, sync, sidebar, shopping, rewards, and various other Edge features. Also disables Windows 8/8.1 EdgeUI features.

name: Disable Sticky Keys Prompt
missing_tokens: Control Panel\Accessibility\StickyKeys

name: Disable Language Switch Hotkey
tokens: Disable Language Switch Hotkey;Disables Ctrl+Shift and Alt+Shift language switching hotkeys to prevent accidental language changes during gaming or typing.

name: Optimize Keyboard Repeat Rate
tokens: Optimize Keyboard Repeat Rate;Sets keyboard to minimum repeat delay and maximum repeat rate for faster typing. Also slows cursor blink rate to 900ms.

name: Disable Enhanced Pointer Precision (Mouse Acceleration)
tokens: Disable Enhanced Pointer Precision (Mouse Acceleration);Disables mouse acceleration for 1:1 mouse movement. Preferred by gamers and precision users.

name: Disable Mouse Throttling for Background Windows
tokens: Disable Mouse Throttling for Background Windows;Disables raw mouse input throttling for background windows, improving mouse responsiveness. Useful for monitoring tools like MouseTester.

name: Disable CPU Idle States (C-States)
missing_tokens: Disables CPU idle states and C-States for minimum latency. Increases power consumption but improves responsiveness. Recommended for gaming/audio production.
tokens: Disable CPU Idle States (C-States);Disables CPU idle states and C-States for minimum latency. Increases power consumption but improves responsiveness. Recommended for gaming/audio production.

name: Disable CPU Core Parking
missing_tokens: Prevents Windows from parking CPU cores, keeping all cores active. Reduces latency and improves responsiveness for gaming and real-time applications.
tokens: Disable CPU Core Parking;Prevents Windows from parking CPU cores, keeping all cores active. Reduces latency and improves responsiveness for gaming and real-time applications.

name: Disable Fast Startup (Hiberboot)
tokens: Disable Fast Startup (Hiberboot);Disables Fast Startup feature which uses hibernation for faster boot times. Fixes some driver and dual-boot issues.

name: Disable Hibernation
missing_tokens: Disables hibernation and deletes hiberfil.sys to save disk space. This prevents the system from entering hibernation mode but does not affect sleep mode.
tokens: Disable Hibernation;Disables hibernation and deletes hiberfil.sys to save disk space. This prevents the system from entering hibernation mode but does not affect sleep mode.

name: Disable Modern Standby
tokens: Disable Modern Standby;Disables Modern Standby (S0 Low Power Idle) and switches to traditional S3 sleep mode. Improves desktop power behavior.

name: Disable Network Adapter Power Saving
tokens: Disable Network Adapter Power Saving;Disables network throttling and optimizes multimedia/network responsiveness. Improves gaming and streaming performance.

name: Disable Power Throttling
tokens: Disable Power Throttling;Disables Windows Power Throttling which limits background process performance. Improves overall system responsiveness.

name: Disable Superfetch (SysMain)
missing_tokens: Disables the Superfetch service (SysMain) which preloads frequently used applications. Can improve performance on SSDs where prefetching is not beneficial.
tokens: Disable Superfetch (SysMain);Disables the Superfetch service (SysMain) which preloads frequently used applications. Can improve performance on SSDs where prefetching is not beneficial.

name: Disable USB Selective Suspend
missing_tokens: Disables USB Selective Suspend to prevent USB devices from powering down unexpectedly. This can resolve issues with USB devices disconnecting or becoming unresponsive.
tokens: Disable USB Selective Suspend;Disables USB Selective Suspend to prevent USB devices from powering down unexpectedly. This can resolve issues with USB devices disconnecting or becoming unresponsive.

name: Disable Windows Search
missing_tokens: Disables the Windows Search indexing service. This can improve system performance but will slow down file searches. Useful for systems with SSDs where search performance is already fast.
tokens: Disable Windows Search;Disables the Windows Search indexing service. This can improve system performance but will slow down file searches. Useful for systems with SSDs where search performance is already fast.

name: Optimize CPU Performance Boost
missing_tokens: Optimizes CPU boost behavior for better performance. Enables boost at guaranteed frequency, extends high-performance duration, and minimizes latency tolerance.
tokens: Optimize CPU Performance Boost;Optimizes CPU boost behavior for better performance. Enables boost at guaranteed frequency, extends high-performance duration, and minimizes latency tolerance.

tokens: Optimize Gaming Network Settings;Boosts priority for gaming tasks, improving network latency and frame timing. Sets high priority for GPU, scheduling, and I/O.

name: Optimize Power Settings for Performance

tokens: Optimize Power Settings for Performance;Applies multiple power optimizations: disables timer coalescing, deep IO coalescing, core parking latency, and energy estimation for maximum performance.
